gates.validator_requirement: Every ledger-declared output for the exported stage must exist inside the exported ZIP unless explicitly declared external_sidecar_required.
gates.failure_prevented: F7 ZIP missing F7_BOOT_RECOVERY_PROOF and baseline lock.

gates.validator_requirement: ZIP must contain final PASS receipts, not pending/export_ready receipts.
gates.failure_prevented: ZIP contained F7 receipt with pending/export-ready state.

gates.validator_requirement: Manifest/provenance must not contain <filled_after_zip>, TODO, pending verdicts, or size 0 placeholders.
gates.failure_prevented: Export manifest had placeholder SHA and size 0.

gates.validator_requirement: Git heads must either match or be explicitly labeled as pre_export_head, exported_tree_head, metadata_commit_head, final_lock_head, and current_working_head.
gates.failure_prevented: Pointer, ledger, receipt, manifest, and provenance used divergent unlabeled heads.

gates.validator_requirement: External sidecar must exist, match ZIP SHA/size, and be referenced by internal manifest using an explicit external_sidecar_required policy when needed.
gates.failure_prevented: Sidecar existed externally but internal manifest did not bind cleanly.

gates.validator_requirement: ZIP entries must be sorted, duplicate-free, cache-free, no nested .git, and use normalized path/mode/timestamp policy.
gates.failure_prevented: Evidence packaging and nested Git repo regression class.

gates.validator_requirement: Stage DAG short IDs must map to full ledger entry IDs; do not infer ID equivalence.
gates.failure_prevented: DAG/ledger latest_pass and stage ID mismatch regressions.

gates.validator_requirement: Boot-critical pointers and registry entries must be unique or quarantined before stable export lock.
gates.failure_prevented: Known conflicting pointer remaining in artifact registry.

gates.validator_requirement: Pointer and ledger may advance only after commit and validation succeed; FAIL/BLOCK/repair entries may not advance latest_pass unless explicitly governed.
Export PASS requires a machine-readable validator decision artifact with all gates PASS.
gates.failure_prevented: Prose-only success declaration after partial proof.
